tasks.subject: Task 1: Schema + sqlc — protocol discriminator
tasks.description:
Add protocol column to upstream_idp (migration 028, additive only — NO drop NOT NULL), thread through InsertUpstreamIDP, regenerate sqlc. Steam rows use empty sentinels for OIDC columns.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/migrations/028_steam_protocol.sql", "db/queries/upstream_idp.sql", "pkg/db/models.go", "pkg/db/upstream_idp.sql.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise run db migrate && sqlc generate && go build -tags nodynamic ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["migration 028 adds protocol column", "InsertUpstreamIDP + structs gain Protocol", "OIDC column types unchanged", "build clean"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: pkg/federation/steam — OpenID 2.0 + Web API adapter
tasks.description:
Self-contained hand-rolled Steam adapter: BuildAuthURL, Verify (check_authentication + anchored claimed_id regex), FetchSummary (GetPlayerSummaries). Full unit tests vs httptest mocks.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/federation/steam/steam.go", "pkg/federation/steam/webapi.go", "pkg/federation/steam/export_test.go", "pkg/federation/steam/steam_test.go", "pkg/federation/steam/webapi_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/federation/steam/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BuildAuthURL valid", "Verify accepts valid + rejects spoof/mismatch/is_valid:false/non-numeric", "FetchSummary parses persona+avatar", "tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Federator seams + begin/HandleCallback Steam branch
tasks.description:
Branch Federator on idp.Protocol for login+invite: beginSteam builds redirect; HandleCallback (+callbackParams url.Values) verifies+enriches+builds *Tokens{Subject,Issuer:steam.Issuer,EmailVerified:false,AMR:[steam],Raw:{preferred_username,name,picture}} → existing Resolve/applyInviteOnly → kickoffAvatarInherit(nil,...). Inject steamVerify/steamSummary seams.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go", "pkg/server/handle_federation.go", "pkg/federation/oidc/federation_test.go", "pkg/federation/oidc/export_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["steam seams injectable", "begin steam branch builds redirect", "HandleCallback steam branch builds Tokens + dispatches", "avatar via nil client + Raw[picture]", "handler passes query", "tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: LinkCallback Steam branch (self-service linking)
tasks.description:
LinkCallback (+callbackParams url.Values) branches on idp.Protocol reusing steamTokens; require_verified_email gate skipped for steam. Link-callback HTTP handler passes r.URL.Query().

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go", "pkg/server/handle_me_identities.go", "pkg/federation/oidc/federation_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LinkCallback steam branch via steamTokens", "email gate skipped for steam", "handler passes query", "steam-link test passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Admin backend — Steam CRUD variant
tasks.description:
createIdentityProviderBody +Protocol +ApiKey; handleCreate branches steam (require apiKey, empty sentinels, require_verified_email=false, seal apiKey) vs oidc (existing). Protocol in IdentityProviderView + FederationProvider + identityProviderView + list handler.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_admin_upstream_idps.go", "pkg/contract/auth.go", "pkg/server/handle_federation.go", "pkg/server/handle_admin_upstream_idps_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/server/ -run IdentityProvider -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["body has Protocol+ApiKey", "steam create validates apiKey + empty sentinels + require_verified_email=false", "protocol in views", "handler tests pass incl OIDC unaffected"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Frontend — admin Steam form + Steam login button
tasks.description:
Recolor+vendor steam-logo.svg (white); SteamButton.vue (native Button, bg-black text-white); FederationButtons branches on protocol; admin create protocol selector + apiKey + conditional fields; detail view protocol read-only + steam relabel; en/zh i18n; vitest.
